email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales Support Administrator bij uw organisatie. Uw omschrijving van een dynamisch team, internationale werkomgeving en focus op klantgerichtheid sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige order-to-cash proces van digitale projecten: van orderopvolging tot facturatie en aftersales. Ik werk nauw samen met accountmanagers en interne afdelingen (supply chain, productie, marketing) om processen te optimaliseren. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling en data-analyse helpt mij om snel problemen op te lossen en efficiënt te werken.

Ik spreek vloeiend Nederlands (B1, in opleiding) en Engels, en heb affiniteit met CRM-systemen en data-analyse. Hoewel ik SAP nog niet heb gebruikt, ben ik een snelle leerder en heb ik ervaring met vergelijkbare ERP-achtige tools.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een persoonlijk gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position at your company. Your description of a dynamic team, international work environment, and customer focus aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage the full order-to-cash process for digital projects: from order follow-up to invoicing and aftersales. I work closely with account managers and internal departments (supply chain, production, marketing) to optimize processes. My technical background in web development and data analysis helps me solve problems quickly and work efficiently.

I speak fluent Dutch (B1, currently studying) and English, and have affinity with CRM systems and data analysis. Although I have not used SAP yet, I am a fast learner and have experience with similar ERP-like tools.

I look forward to explaining my motivation and skills in a personal conversation.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel interesse solliciteer ik naar de functie van Sales Support Administrator in de chemiesector. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte, nauwkeurige en probleemoplossende medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige order-to-cash proces: van orderontvangst en opvolging tot verzending, facturatie en aftersales. Ik werk dagelijks met accountmanagers en interne afdelingen (supply chain, productie, marketing) om een vlotte doorstroom te garanderen. Mijn ervaring met het optimaliseren van processen en het coördineren met verschillende stakeholders heeft mij geleerd om zowel diplomatisch als assertief te communiceren.

Daarnaast heb ik een sterke affiniteit met data en systemen. Ik gebruik tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs voor rapportage en optimalisatie. Hoewel ik SAP nog niet heb gebruikt, ben ik ervan overtuigd dat ik dit snel onder de knie krijg dankzij mijn technische achtergrond en leergierigheid.

Mijn project mirook.com toont mijn vermogen om zelfstandig een volledig project te beheren: van planning en uitvoering tot optimalisatie en rapportage. Ik ben gewend om verantwoordelijkheid te nemen en resultaatgericht te werken.

Ik spreek vloeiend Nederlands (B1, in opleiding) en Engels, en heb een groot aanpassingsvermogen. Uw aanbod van een competitief salarispakket, internationale omgeving en ontwikkelingsmogelijkheden spreekt mij zeer aan.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very interested in the Sales Support Administrator position in the chemical sector. Your call for a customer-oriented, accurate, and problem-solving employee aligns perfectly with my profile.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for the full order-to-cash process: from order receipt and follow-up to shipping, invoicing, and aftersales. I work daily with account managers and internal departments (supply chain, production, marketing) to ensure smooth flow. My experience in optimizing processes and coordinating with various stakeholders has taught me to communicate both diplomatically and assertively.

Additionally, I have a strong affinity with data and systems. I use tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs for reporting and optimization. Although I have not used SAP yet, I am confident I will master it quickly thanks to my technical background and eagerness to learn.

My project mirook.com demonstrates my ability to independently manage a complete project: from planning and execution to optimization and reporting. I am used to taking responsibility and working result-oriented.

I speak fluent Dutch (B1, currently studying) and English, and have great adaptability. Your offer of a competitive salary package, international environment, and development opportunities appeals to me greatly.

I hope to further explain my motivation in a conversation.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Full order-to-cash process management: order follow-up, invoicing, aftersales, and coordination with account managers and internal departments (supply chain, production, marketing)
• Strong communication skills in Dutch (B1, actively improving) and English, with daily stakeholder contact
• Analytical and data-driven: experienced with CRM-like tools, Google Analytics, SEMrush, and reporting
• Problem-solving and process optimization: technical background in web development and SEO audits
• Self-starter with project management experience: independently built and optimized a multi-page website (mirook.com)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I manage the full order-to-cash process for digital projects: order follow-up, invoicing, aftersales, and coordination with account managers and internal departments (supply chain, production, marketing). On my own project (mirook.com) I have applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Order-to-cash process management: order follow-up, invoicing, aftersales, coordination with account managers and internal departments
- Customer service & stakeholder communication: diplomatic, assertive, daily contact with distributors and internal teams
- Data analysis & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- CRM & system affinity: experienced with data-driven tools, quick learner for SAP
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage the full order-to-cash process for client digital projects: order follow-up, invoicing, aftersales, and coordination with account managers and internal teams (supply chain, production, marketing)
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
